name: DevBrain
description: Offline Code Intelligence Platform with Multi-Agent RAG, P2P Delegation, Multimodal Analysis, and Fine-Tuning
note: DevBrain is 100% offline. Zero remote API calls. All inference (LLM, embeddings, vision, TTS, STT) runs locally via QVAC SDK on consumer hardware. P2P communication uses Holepunch DHT (peer-to-peer, no cloud relay).

qvac_sdk_usage.inference: qvac.completion() — multi-agent LLM inference with tool calling
qvac_sdk_usage.rag: qvac.ragIngest() + qvac.ragSearch() — vector store for codebase chunks
qvac_sdk_usage.multimodal: qvac.completion() with image content — screenshot/diagram analysis
qvac_sdk_usage.fine_tuning: qvac.fineTune() — LoRA adapter training via QVAC Fabric
